title: Amtech G4485 Long Reach Angled Paint Brush, 1” (25mm) Radiator Paint Brush, No Bristle Loss design with 30cm handle
features: Ideal Product: The Amtech Long Reach Angled Paint Brush is suitable to use with a variety of paints, including emulsions and oil-based paints, as well as varnish.
Suitable for: With a 30cm polypropylene handle, this 25mm long reach paint brush is designed for reaching those difficult areas behind pipes and radiators.
Sizes: The Amtech long reach radiator paint brush range is available individually in three different sizes: 25mm/1” (Amtech G4485), 38mm/1.5” (Amtech G4490), and 50mm/2” (Amtech G4495).
Grip: These synthetic paint brushes have a soft comfortable grip for smooth interaction. The Amtech decorators paint brush range is also easy to clean and store for prolonged use.
Quality: To ensure you have a smooth finish during paint application, this paint brush range has a no bristle loss design, as well as, a tapered synthetic filament for even paint offload.
description: Product Description Amtech has a fantastic range of essential DIY tools for all your decorating and household needs. Our range of good quality tapered synthetic filament paint brushes are available in three different sizes, including 25mm/1”, 38mm/1.5”, and 50mm/2”. The thickness and length of the filament is designed for great paint pick-up and effective paint coverage. Amtech’s great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
